definition: something that is public is for people in general and not only a small group of people
example: Public speaking is a skill that many people have to learn to do well.

definition: a moral is a lesson about right and wrong that we learn from a story or event
example: The moral of the story “The tortoise and the hare” is that slow and steady wins the race.

definition: a folk story is a traditional story in a culture
example: Every culture has its own folk stories that teach valuable lessons.

definition: someone who is greedy wants more of something than they need
example: The boy was greedy and wanted to eat all the cookies on the plate.

definition: if someone is jealous, they want something that someone else has
example: Elias is jealous of the success Timothy has had at work.

definition: a decoration is something that you wear to make yourself look more beautiful or special
example: Many women wear rings and necklaces as decoration to make themselves look more attractive.

definition: if you say after a while, you mean a length of time that can be a few minutes or a few hours
example: Ester went to the party but left after a while because she was bored.

definition: a tiger is a large wild cat with yellow, orange, or white fur that has black lines on it
example: I could see the tiger near the tree because its fur was such a bright color.

definition: a goat is a small animal that is similar to a sheep, but with longer legs. It makes milk.
example: The young goat was just starting to grow horns.

definition: a folktale is an old traditional story
example: Every country has its own folktales.

definition: if you tie something, you attach it to something else with a rope or a piece of string
example: Tie the box to the roof of the car with these ropes.

definition: comedy is a show or a performance that is funny and makes people laugh
example: My favorite type of show to watch is comedy because I like jokes.

definition: if you stare at something or someone, you look at it/ them for a long time without moving your eyes
example: In some cultures, it’s rude to stare at people.

definition: a microphone is a piece of technology that you speak into to make your voice sound louder
example: The microphone was not on, so no one could hear Mrs. Diaz when she started speaking.

definition: a costume is a set of clothes you wear to look like someone else, especially in a play
example: Dante wore a cowboy costume for Halloween.

definition: if you put out something, like a fire, you stop it
example: The rain put out the fire early at the camp last night.

definition: a wildfire is a fire, especially in nature, that burns quickly over a large area
example: There were several wildfires in Australia last year.

definition: a plot is different events that make the story in a book, play, or movie
example: The play has a very simple plot, but the story is entertaining.

definition: a scene is a short part of a play or movie where things happen in one place
example: The first scene of the play is set in Scotland.

definition: if you say you have a sense of humor, you mean you have the ability to find something funny
example: Jilly has a wonderful sense of humor and laughs easily.

definition: someone who is intelligent is very clever and can learn and understand new things easily
example: Artur is an intelligent student, but he lacks motivation.

definition: if you say you will stay in touch with someone, you mean you will contact them often via telephone, email, letter, etc.
example: Bibi and her cousin stay in touch through email and WhatsApp messages.

definition: a quality is part of who a person is and how they behave
example: Loyalty is a good quality for a person to have.

definition: something that is spare is available to use because it is extra and not needed by anyone
example: Do you have a spare pen that I could use?

definition: grasslands are a large part of land that is covered by grass, often with wild animals
example: The sheep are eating in the grassland.

definition: a rating is a point or mark you give to say how good something is
example: What rating would you give this online game?

definition: a giraffe is a large animal, with a very long neck and long legs, that eats leaves
example: A fully-grown giraffe is 5.5 m tall.

definition: a zebra is an animal that looks like a horse with black and white lines on its body
example: I once watched a lioness hunting a zebra.

definition: if you scare a person or an animal, you make them feel afraid
example: Loud noises can scare animals and small children.
